name: Catalyst Paper Corporation
description: Catalyst Paper Corporation is a Canadian producer of industrial packaging, newsprint, coated groundwood, and specialty printing papers. Headquartered in Richmond, British Columbia, the company operates pulp and paper mills in Western Canada and the United States, serving retailers, publishers, and commercial printers across North America and internationally. In 2019, Catalyst Paper was acquired by Paper Excellence, a global diversified manufacturer of pulp and paper products.
